title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Housing.com International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Housing.com International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Housing.com International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Housing.com International Enterprises:
Housing.com International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com International Enterprises!
